title: provider-bitbucket plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the provider-bitbucket semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_APP_PASSWORD.description: Bitbucket app password for API authentication.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_NOTES_FILENAME.description: Optional filename for uploaded release notes or artifacts.

SEMREL_TAG_NAME.description: Release tag name for the current semrel execution.

SEMREL_CHANGELOG.description: Generated release notes or changelog content from semrel core.

SEMREL_DRY_RUN.description: When true, perform validation and logging only without executing side effects.
